response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack experience with direct alignment to the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React), active AI agent and MCP framework work in his current role, and a demonstrated culture of TDD and software craftsmanship across staff and senior-level positions. He comfortably exceeds the 6-year experience threshold and has shipped at scale (millions of direct mail pieces, millions of HTTP requests/sec). The primary gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Python in his history, and no named references to Jest, Vitest, or Playwright — though his authorship of D-language testing frameworks signals strong testing instincts that likely transfer.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack depth with TypeScript, Node.js, and React directly matching the primary stack
Current hands-on AI agent and MCP framework development satisfies the AI agent experience requirement at a staff level
Proven containerization and cloud experience via Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS CDK across multiple production environments
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience anywhere in the resume despite it being the primary backend framework for this role
Kotlin and Python are absent from listed skills and all employment history, yet both appear as required proficiencies
Named JS testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) are never referenced; testing credibility rests on D-language tooling which may not translate directly
